stem: A agriculture study measures the yield per hectare (tonnes) for a sample of 20 farms. The sample mean is 256.1 tonnes with a sample standard deviation of 38.3 tonnes. Assuming the data are approximately normally distributed, estimate the true population mean and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Population mean ≈ 256.1 tonnes. 95% CI = [238.2, 274.0]. Point estimate: 256.1 tonnes.

common_failure_modes: Using z-critical value instead of t-critical for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
